task_yaml.task:
I am preparing a dependency upgrade note for a small Python service.
The current pins and target versions are here:

    /tmp_workspace/clawbench/sources/pypi_upgrade/requirements.in
    /tmp_workspace/clawbench/sources/pypi_upgrade/upgrade_targets.json

Please verify each target version using official PyPI project/version
pages in the browser. You may also use the official PyPI JSON API for
metadata, but save browser evidence from real PyPI pages.

For each package, collect:
- package name
- current pin
- target version
- official PyPI target-version URL
- first upload date/time for the target version
- requires_python
- file count
- whether a wheel exists
- whether an sdist exists
- a short upgrade risk note

Save structured data at:

    /tmp_workspace/results/pypi_upgrade_audit.json

Save a Markdown report at:

    /tmp_workspace/results/pypi_upgrade_report.md

Save at least two PyPI browser screenshots under:

    /tmp_workspace/results/pypi_screenshots/

Do not compare against whatever is currently latest on PyPI. The
target versions in `upgrade_targets.json` are the audit anchors.
